build.stdout:
rm	*.o *.out \
	./kernel/*.o \
	./util/timer/*.o \
	./util/num/*.o \
                output.txt

gcc	./main.c \
		-c \
		-o ./main.o \
		-O3
gcc	./kernel/kernel_cpu.c \
		-c \
		-o ./kernel/kernel_cpu.o \
		-O3 \
		-fopenmp
gcc	./kernel/kernel_cpu_2.c \
		-c \
		-o ./kernel/kernel_cpu_2.o \
		-O3 \
		-fopenmp
gcc	./util/timer/timer.c \
		-c \
		-o ./util/timer/timer.o \
		-O3
gcc	./util/num/num.c \
		-c \
		-o ./util/num/num.o \
		-O3
gcc	./main.o \
		./kernel/kernel_cpu.o \
		./kernel/kernel_cpu_2.o \
		./util/timer/timer.o \
		./util/num/num.o \
		-lm \
		-lgomp \
                        -o b+tree.out
